• Phoenix (PHX) – from $137 roundtrip
• San Francisco (SFO) – from $147 roundtrip
• Denver (DEN) – from $177 roundtrip
• Seattle (SEA) – from $197 roundtrip

Book by Sunday, October 6 for travel through November 20. Terms apply.
